scores.correctness_notes: Covers all three notice types correctly, accurately describes pebble_custom_notice dispatch, de-duplication behaviour, and CLI. Adds pebble_change_updated which is a real ops event. Minor inaccuracy: warning key described as '<message-hash>' but gold standard says 'human-readable warning message'.
scores.hallucination_notes: The '1 hour' default repeat interval is stated confidently but is unverified. 'event.workload' returning ops.model.Container is questionable — the attribute name may differ. Notice attribute 'last_repeated' as a de-duplication boundary concept exists in Pebble but the exact attribute name is unconfirmed. These are minor inaccuracies rather than clearly fabricated APIs.
